species: The mitochondrial F1Fo ATP synthase of the parasite Trypanosoma brucei has been previously studied in detail.
sample_source: To investigate the function of Tb927.8.3070, we produced a tetracycline-inducible RNAi cell line of procyclic T. brucei.
strain: Transgenic T. brucei cell lines were generated using the procyclic strain 29-13.
